_comment: Thresholds reflect the current achievable floor on the public demo (Astro + React 19, Cloudflare CDN in front). Tighten as perf work lands. CWV 'good' targets — LCP <= 2500, FCP <= 1800, CLS <= 0.1, TBT <= 200 — are the aspirational end-state; see the open follow-up task for perf work. See web.dev/articles/vitals for the underlying definitions.
